hero.title: Public offers and guest requests
hero.body: Inspect public offers, payment state, approval backlog, and live fulfillment without exposing secret payloads or guest tokens.

viewerNote.title: Viewer access is read-only
viewerNote.body: You can inspect public offers and guest requests here, but only admins and operators can make changes.

offers.title: Offer inventory
offers.body: Filter the guest queue by a specific offer, inspect capacity, and disable obsolete offers.
offers.emptyBody: Create guest-facing offers from the API to manage them here.

intents.title: Guest intents
intents.body: Review approval state, payment outcome, and request lifecycle.
intents.emptyBodyFiltered: No guest requests match the selected offer and status filters.
intents.emptyBodyDefault: No guest requests have been created for this workspace yet.

intentDetail.title: Selected guest request
intentDetail.body: Drill into the current record. This view excludes guest tokens, fulfill URLs, and submitted payload data.
intentDetail.loadingBody: Reading the latest offer, payment, and request-state summary.
intentDetail.emptyBody: Choose a guest intent from the queue to inspect its detail.

confirm.revokeOfferBody: This disables {{label}} for new guest requests immediately.
confirm.approveIntentBody: This makes the pending guest request payable or directly activatable according to the offer policy.
confirm.rejectIntentBody: This permanently denies the current guest request without exposing any secret material.
confirm.revokeIntentBody: This invalidates any active fulfill path for the guest request and prevents later retrieval.
confirm.retryDeliveryBody: This reissues the current pending guest-agent fulfillment path.

errors.loadDetailFailed: Unable to load guest intent detail
errors.actionFailed: Unable to update guest access state
